name: instant-api healthz scripted (build-SHA freshness)
description: Scripted API monitor that asserts /healthz returns ok=true, carries a non-placeholder commit_id (not 'dev'/'unknown'), reports migration_status=ok, and was built within the last 30 days. Catches stale-image deploys, un-instrumented builds, and schema drift that a plain status-code ping cannot see. Script: scripts/api-healthz-scripted.js. Feeds the api-healthz-down alert via SyntheticCheck.
